panels.description:
Сводная таблица утилизации GPU по устройствам

Ресурсы GPU запрашиваются использую PodSpec K8s для ресурса типа `nvidia.com/gpu`

targets.expr: max by (Hostname, gpu) (avg_over_time(DCGM_FI_DEV_POWER_USAGE{Hostname="$node", gpu=~"$gpu"}[$__range]))

sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL{Hostname="$node", gpu=~"$gpu"})) by (Hostname, gpu) or sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_PROF_SM_ACTIVE{Hostname="$node", gpu=~"$gpu"}) * 100) by (Hostname, gpu) or sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_PROF_GR_ENGINE_ACTIVE{Hostname="$node", gpu=~"$gpu"}) * 100) by (Hostname, gpu)
sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_SM_CLOCK{Hostname="$node", gpu=~"$gpu"}) * 1000000) by (Hostname, gpu)
sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_MEM_CLOCK{Hostname="$node", gpu=~"$gpu"}) * 1000000) by (Hostname, gpu)

100 * sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{Hostname="$node", gpu=~"$gpu"})) by (Hostname, gpu) / clamp_min(sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{Hostname="$node", gpu=~"$gpu"})) by (Hostname, gpu) + sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_FREE{Hostname="$node", gpu=~"$gpu"})) by (Hostname, gpu), 1)
sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_PROF_PCIE_TX_BYTES{Hostname="$node", gpu=~"$gpu"})) by (Hostname, gpu)
sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_PROF_PCIE_RX_BYTES{Hostname="$node", gpu=~"$gpu"})) by (Hostname, gpu)
max(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_TEMP{Hostname="$node", gpu=~"$gpu"})) by(Hostname, gpu)
sum(max(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_POWER_USAGE{Hostname="$node", gpu=~"$gpu"})) by(Hostname, gpu)) by (Hostname, gpu)

panels.title: Summary

targets.expr: sum(max(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_POWER_USAGE{Hostname=~"$node", gpu=~"$gpu"})) by(Hostname, gpu)) by(Hostname, gpu)
max(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_TEMP{Hostname="$node"})) by (Hostname, gpu)

sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL{Hostname=~"$node", gpu=~"$gpu"})) by(Hostname, gpu) or sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_PROF_SM_ACTIVE{Hostname=~"$node", gpu=~"$gpu"}) * 100) by(Hostname, gpu) or sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_PROF_GR_ENGINE_ACTIVE{Hostname=~"$node", gpu=~"$gpu"}) * 100) by(Hostname, gpu)

panels.description:
Утилизация тензорных ядер использующих HMMA*, основанная на продолжительности циклов их работы

*Half matrix multiplication and accumulation

targets.expr: sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_PROF_PIPE_TENSOR_ACTIVE{Hostname=~"$node", gpu=~"$gpu"})) by(Hostname, gpu) / count(sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_PROF_PIPE_TENSOR_ACTIVE{Hostname=~"$node", gpu=~"$gpu"}))by(Hostname, gpu)) by(Hostname, gpu)

panels.title: GPU Tensor Core Utilization: ${node}

targets.expr: 100 * sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{Hostname=~"$node", gpu=~"$gpu"})) by(Hostname, gpu) / clamp_min(sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{Hostname=~"$node", gpu=~"$gpu"})) by(Hostname, gpu) + sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_FREE{Hostname=~"$node", gpu=~"$gpu"})) by(Hostname, gpu), 1)

100 * max by (Hostname, gpu, GPU_I_PROFILE, GPU_I_ID) (max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{Hostname=~"$node", gpu=~"$gpu", GPU_I_PROFILE=~".+"})) / clamp_min(max by (Hostname, gpu, GPU_I_PROFILE, GPU_I_ID) (max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{Hostname=~"$node", gpu=~"$gpu", GPU_I_PROFILE=~".+"})) + max by (Hostname, gpu, GPU_I_PROFILE, GPU_I_ID) (max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_FREE{Hostname=~"$node", gpu=~"$gpu", GPU_I_PROFILE=~".+"})), 1)
sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{Hostname=~"$node", gpu=~"$gpu"})) by(Hostname, gpu)

max by (Hostname, gpu, GPU_I_PROFILE, GPU_I_ID) (max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{Hostname=~"$node", gpu=~"$gpu", GPU_I_PROFILE=~".+"}))

panels.description: Утилизация графического движка, основанная на продолжительности его работы

targets.expr: sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_PROF_GR_ENGINE_ACTIVE{Hostname=~"$node", gpu=~"$gpu"})) by(Hostname, gpu)  / count(sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_PROF_GR_ENGINE_ACTIVE{Hostname=~"$node", gpu=~"$gpu"})) by(Hostname, gpu)) by(Hostname, gpu)

panels.title: GPU Graphics Engine Utilization: ${node}

targets.expr: 100 * avg(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_PROF_DRAM_ACTIVE{Hostname=~"$node", gpu=~"$gpu"})) by(Hostname, gpu)

panels.description: Скорость передачи данных между графическими процессорами

targets.expr: sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (rate(DCGM_FI_DEV_NVLINK_BANDWIDTH_TOTAL{Hostname=~"$node", gpu=~"$gpu"}[$__rate_interval]))) by(Hostname, gpu)

panels.title: GPU NVLink Activity: ${node}

panels.description:
Скорость передачи данных через линию шины PCIe RX используя NVML*

*NVIDIA Management Library

targets.expr: sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_PROF_PCIE_RX_BYTES{Hostname=~"$node", gpu=~"$gpu"})) by(Hostname, gpu)

panels.title: GPU PCIe Receive: ${node}

panels.description:
Скорость передачи данных через линию шины PCIe TX используя NVML*

*NVIDIA Management Library

targets.expr: sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_PROF_PCIE_TX_BYTES{Hostname=~"$node", gpu=~"$gpu"})) by(Hostname, gpu)

panels.title: GPU PCIe Transmit: ${node}

targets.expr: sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_SM_CLOCK{Hostname=~"$node", gpu=~"$gpu"})) by(Hostname, gpu) * 1000000
sum(max without (exported_namespace, exported_pod, exported_container, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_MEM_CLOCK{Hostname=~"$node", gpu=~"$gpu"})) by(Hostname, gpu) * 1000000
